description.zh: 在开放实验台自由放置电池、灯泡、电机、开关和保护器件，搭建串联、并联与混合电路；实时观察电压、电流、功率和亮度，制造并修复断路、短路，还能保存自己的夜光小镇。
description.en: Freely place batteries, lamps, motors, switches, junctions, and protection devices. Build series, parallel, or mixed circuits; observe live voltage, current, power, and brightness; create and repair faults; then save your glowing town.
